Design Tokens

  • Colors
  • Typography
  • Spacing & Shadows

Colors

Brand orange palette, neutral grays, and semantic color tokens for the Storyhouse design system.

Brand Orange

The primary brand palette — a warm orange spectrum from light backgrounds to deep accents.

 --color-brand-orange-50 #fff7ed Lightest background
--color-brand-orange-100 #ffedd5 Shade 100
--color-brand-orange-200 #fed7aa Shade 200
--color-brand-orange-300 #fdba74 Shade 300
--color-brand-orange-400 #fb923c Shade 400
--color-brand-orange-500 #f97316 Primary brand color
--color-brand-orange-600 #ea580c Shade 600
--color-brand-orange-700 #c2410c Shade 700
--color-brand-orange-800 #9a3412 Shade 800
--color-brand-orange-900 #7c2d12 Shade 900
--color-brand-orange-950 #431407 Darkest accent

Neutral Gray

A cool gray scale for surfaces, borders, and text.

 --color-gray-50 #fafafa Page background
--color-gray-100 #f5f5f5 Surface background
--color-gray-200 #e5e5e5 Border color
--color-gray-300 #d4d4d4 Shade 300
--color-gray-400 #a3a3a3 Shade 400
--color-gray-500 #737373 Muted text
--color-gray-600 #525252 Shade 600
--color-gray-700 #404040 Body text
--color-gray-800 #262626 Shade 800
--color-gray-900 #171717 Heading text
--color-gray-950 #0a0a0a Darkest text

Semantic Colors

Semantic color scales for status and feedback — success, warning, danger, and info.

Success (Green)

50
100
200
300
400
500
600
700
800
900

Warning (Amber)

50
100
200
300
400
500
600
700
800
900

Danger (Red)

50
100
200
300
400
500
600
700
800
900

Info (Blue)

50
100
200
300
400
500
600
700
800
900
tokens.css 
/* Semantic color CSS custom properties */
--color-success-500: #22c55e;
--color-warning-500: #f59e0b;
--color-danger-500: #ef4444;
--color-info-500: #3b82f6;

/* Each color has 10 shades (50-900) for flexibility */

Using Color Tokens

styles.css 
.my-element {
  background: var(--color-brand-orange-500);
  color: var(--color-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200);
}

.status-badge {
  background: var(--color-success-100);
  color: var(--color-success-700);
}
typescript.ts 
import { colors } from '@storyhouse/tokens';

console.log(colors.brand.orange[500]); // '#f97316'
console.log(colors.semantic.success[500]); // '#22c55e'
ESC
Type to search components, guides, tokens, and more…
